_comment: Copy this file to scaffold.config.json and fill in real values. Then run: node scripts/scaffold.mjs
_env_vars_required: OPENAI_API_KEY      — used to generate the initial 50 articles AND the monthly cron
GITHUB_TOKEN        — used to push to <repo> and set repo secrets (or fall back to gh CLI)
CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN  — optional, enables auto-deploy to Cloudflare Workers
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY   — optional fallback for article generation if OPENAI_API_KEY is absent
